focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
【金融新闻】在这场大会 感受人工智能的“智”与“志”
【中国新闻】美军发动新一轮空袭 伊朗多地传出爆炸声
【世界新闻】Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities

items.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
items.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

items.title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
items.summary: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

items.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
items.summary: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

items.title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
items.summary: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.

items.title: 在这场大会 感受人工智能的“智”与“志”
items.summary: 新闻1+1丨在这场大会 感受人工智能的“智”与“志”

items.title: 中关村国际技术交易中心熟化工坊在京发布
items.summary: 中新网北京7月17日电 (记者 陈杭)记者17日从北京市科委、中关村管委会获悉，中关村国际技术交易中心重点实验室成果转化系列活动在北京拉开帷幕，立足北京科技成果转化工作全局，锚定重点实验室创新源头，以专业化、体系化服务精准发力，推动重点实验室“原创之火”加速转化为北京产业升级的“发展之势”。

items.title: 美军发动新一轮空袭 伊朗多地传出爆炸声
items.summary: 总台记者当地时间18日凌晨获悉，伊朗多地传出爆炸声。伊朗南部法尔斯省拉尔市南部郊区传出爆炸声；伊朗中部城市亚兹德周边地区传出5次爆炸声，当地居民称听见战机飞行的声音。

items.title: 委内瑞拉强震遇难人数上升至5069人
items.summary: 当地时间17日，委内瑞拉全国代表大会主席豪尔赫·罗德里格斯通过社交媒体通报，该国6月24日发生的强震造成的遇难人数上升至5069人，受伤人数为16740人，强震过后发生余震1331次。(总台记者 宫祥诚)

items.title: 尼泊尔首个野生动物风险保险政策正式生效
items.summary: 中新社加德满都7月17日电 (记者 崔楠)尼泊尔野生动物风险保险政策17日正式生效，这是该国首次建立针对野生动物造成人员伤亡及财产损失的保险框架。

items.title: 尼泊尔过去三个月各类灾害致163人身亡
items.summary: 中新社加德满都7月17日电 (记者 崔楠)尼泊尔国家减灾应急管理局17日发布公告称，过去三个月，该国共发生3347起各类灾害事件，造成163人身亡、1人失踪、972人受伤。

items.title: 伯纳姆执掌英国工党：“我已经准备好了”
items.summary: 中新社伦敦7月17日电 题：伯纳姆执掌英国工党：“我已经准备好了”

items.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
items.summary: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire condition

items.title: Kim Jong Un was meant to be their only idol - then North Koreans discovered K-pop
items.summary: Defectors tell the BBC that despite restrictions, K-pop has cut through in the stifling dictatorship.

items.title: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
items.summary: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.

items.title: Taco Bell removes lettuce from menu in US after links to explosive diarrhoea parasite
items.summary: About 1,645 people in five states were infected by the parasite after having Taco Bell, according to US health officials.

items.title: One anti-war critic fined, another held as Russia clamps down on opponents
items.summary: While Boris Nadezhdin is barred from running for parliament, blogger Ilya Remeslo is remanded in custody.

items.title: pixel-point/aval（⭐ 1162）
items.summary: A new open-source format for interactive video on the web, with a built-in state machine, frame-accurate transitions, and packed-alpha transparency.

items.summary: Intercept any app, then call it from Python like a library
